headline: Best Buy (BBY) Stock Fair Value Rises After Q1 Relief Rally And Analyst Revisions
summary: The analyst fair value estimate for Best Buy has shifted from US$72.50 to US$79.15, signaling a recalibration of where the stock might reasonably trade. This change aligns with Street research that balances upbeat reactions to stronger than expected Q1 results and product cycle support against concerns around leadership transitions, competitive pressures, and consumer electronics demand. As you read on, you will see how these moving pieces fit together and how to keep track of the evolving...
